name: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
description: Given an integer array nums sorted in non-decreasing order, remove the duplicates in-place such that each unique element appears only once. constraints: 1 <= nums.length <= 3 * 10^4. -100 <= nums[i] <= 100. nums is sorted in non-decreasing order.
